title: Unparalleled
description: Press J to empower yourself and unlock unparalleled power
body:
Overview

Unparalleled introduces a brand-new combat ability that lets you transcend mortal limits.
By default, you can activate it with the J key to enter a state of absolute power and elegance.

When activated, your character becomes faster, stronger, and untouchable — leaving afterimages as you dominate the battlefield.

⚔️ Ability Details

Duration: 10 seconds
Cooldown: 60 seconds

While active, you gain the following effects:

⚡ Speed V — move faster than anyone else

🛡️ Immunity to fall damage — soar freely without fear

🪶 Double jump — reach impossible heights

🔥 4× damage output — strike with overwhelming force

💖 2× healing efficiency — recover faster than ever

🌈 Stylish afterimage effect — because true power deserves flair

🌟 How to Use

Press J (default keybind) to activate Unparalleled

Watch your enemies fall before your unstoppable might

Wait for the 60-second cooldown, then do it all again

(The keybind can be changed in the Controls settings.)

💬 Why You’ll Love It

This mod is for players who love fast, fluid, anime-style combat — a brief window where you become the ultimate warrior.
Perfect for boss fights, daring escapes, or just flexing your power in style.

🔧 Compatibility

Built for Minecraft Forge 1.20.1+

Works seamlessly with most combat and visual enhancement mods
